name: Extract video frames
description: Extract up to six still frames from a video owned by the current user. Uses the attached video by default and returns downloadable image artifacts.

fileId.description: Optional id of a video owned by the user. Defaults to an attached video.

timestamps.description: Optional timestamps in seconds. When omitted, frames are spaced across the video.

count.description: Number of evenly spaced frames. Default 1.

width.description: Maximum frame width in pixels. Default 1280.
